INSERT INTO languages VALUES ('I love coding in Python!'), ('El clima es muy agradable hoy.'), ('Ceci est un test pour détecter la langue.');
SELECT detectLanguage(text) AS language_code FROM languages WHERE text LIKE '%test%';
SELECT detectLanguage(CONCAT('Hello, ', text)) AS lang_code FROM languages;
CREATE TABLE extended_languages AS SELECT detectLanguage(text) AS lang_code FROM languages;
SELECT lang_code, COUNT(*) FROM extended_languages GROUP BY lang_code;
SELECT detectLanguage(text) AS detected_language FROM (SELECT text FROM languages WHERE LENGTH(text) > 50);
CREATE TABLE multi_languages AS SELECT detectLanguage(text) AS lang_code FROM (SELECT text FROM languages UNION ALL SELECT 'Test de langue en français!');
SELECT lang_code FROM multi_languages WHERE lang_code = 'fr' OR lang_code IS NULL;
SELECT detectLanguage(text) FROM (SELECT text FROM languages WHERE LENGTH(text) > 100) AS subq WHERE text IS NOT NULL;
SELECT detectLanguage(text) FROM languages WHERE LENGTH(text) < 10;
SELECT detectLanguage('This is a simple sentence.') AS language_detected, COUNT(*) FROM languages GROUP BY language_detected;
SELECT detectLanguage(text) FROM languages WHERE text = (SELECT text FROM languages LIMIT 1) ORDER BY LENGTH(text) DESC;
